---
title: "syncweaver"
---

{{< include badges.qmd >}}

> synchronize code and weave patches seamlessly

syncweaver synchronizes code between package repositories and capsule
repositories, and manages the full lifecycle of patch files from generation
through upstream pull request submission, rejection annotation, and
dependency-aware release dispatch.

View the documentation website at <https://ccbr.github.io/syncweaver>.

## Installation

{{< include install.qmd >}}

## Usage

{{< include usage.qmd >}}

## Help and Contributing

{{< include help.qmd >}}

## Citation

{{< include cite.qmd >}}
